🎬 Background Artists Wanted – Project 79

We are looking for paid background artists for an exciting new production filming in Birmingham on 20th, 21st, 23rd & 24th June 2026.

📍 Location: Birmingham
👥 Ages: 18–70
🌍 Open to all ethnicities
🕗 Tentative call time: 8:00am
🎥 Continuity role – applicants who are available for all listed dates are preferred
💰Paid
🚌 Transport from London is provided

Interested and available? You can apply by sending a DM 📩 or emailing us directly at benaentertainmenthouse@gmail.com

Please include:
• Recent full-length photos
• Your full name
• Your contact number
• Your availability for the listed dates

#castingcall #backgroundartist #extraswanted #birminghamuk #filminguk

sharedPost.text:
The clock's ticking and the stage won't wait. Final call for male and female actors.

East London DramaFest 2026 is happening in autumn, and JDG is throwing open the doors one last time. We're recruiting actors of every age, every background, plus the backstage wizards who make the magic happen.

This year, we're bringing Master Jonjon's brand-new play to life: "Game Fillet Game: A Dive into Influencing Careers… Uninvented Jobs… Surprise Missions…", a gripping story of friendship, adventure, and loyalty. 

(Curious? Get the full story here: cutt.ly/GFGstory)

Our free masterclass workshop rehearsals welcome a variety of skill levels, running on selected Sundays, July through September.

But final calls don't come twice.

Sign up for your audition now: cutt.ly/GFGsignup

The spotlight's waiting. Don't let it wait for someone else.

#theatrelondon #thingstodoinlondon #eastlondonplays #londonplay #eastlondondrama #eastlondontheatre #londonevents #auditioning #londonperformance #londontheatre #auditions

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
Proud to announce that Tammy Doyle and I have been working on a new short film titled 'Breaking the Cycle'. 

Based on true events, ‘Breaking the Cycle’ tells the story of Mia, a young mother trapped in a volatile relationship with her partner, Darren whiling caring for her newborn baby Conor. As his behaviour worsens, Mia endures physically and emotionally, taking it for the sake of their child. However, when the abuse intensifies and now threatens young Conor, Mia knows she must act. Taking a chance. Leaving the only life she has known and risking everything for the sake of herself and more importantly her child. Making those important steps towards breaking the generational cycle of abuse. 

After some time prepping, we are now ready to cast and seek crew for our short film.

We are looking for a small crew to help on shooting days in departments such as camera, lighting, sound, costume, make up and production assistants. 

Below features the list of characters we are looking to cast:

 

MIA (Early to Mid-20s) - Female

A young mother trying to survive an abusive relationship while caring for her newborn son. Physically and emotionally drained, she feels isolated and unsupported, yet possesses a quiet strength and resilience. Her love for her baby ultimately gives her the courage to escape and rebuild her life.

DARREN (Late 20s) - Male

A volatile, controlling, and increasingly dangerous man. Struggling with alcohol and drug abuse, his behaviour swings between intimidation and violence. He is deeply insecure and becomes jealous of the attention given to his own child, leading to escalating abuse.

DARREN’S FATHER RICHARD (50s–60s) – Male

Dismissive and self-interested, and an abuser himself, he downplays the seriousness of the situation. More concerned about maintaining access to his grandson than Mia’s safety, he represents a generation that avoids confronting abuse directly.

MIA’S SISTER DONNA (20s-30s) – Female (NON-SPEAKING)

Must be able to Drive

Practical and supportive, Mia’s sister helps her escape despite the risks involved. While not deeply involved emotionally, she steps up when it matters, providing a way out when Mia needs it most.

This is a micro-budget project currently, but we are in the process of seeking funding. However, until then, the project is UNPAID, however travel expenses and catering will be covered at the very least. 

If you are interested in the project, please send your applications to shaundaly2510@gmail.com with name, character you would like to audition for or crew role you are interested in, head shots and showreels, past work and other media would be greatly welcomed as well. Deadline for Applications for both Cast and Crew will be on Midnight of July 10th, 2026. With auditions to be held on 15th and 16th July with one day on the Wirral and the other in Liverpool City Centre. More details will be given closer to the time.

items.text:
After three years in Sydney, Left Leg Productions is thrilled to be back on British soil with Weird West-End! Co-Produced with The Stage Door we’ll be bringing you your favourite musical theatre anthems in weird and wonderful ways on the 8th August. 
Have you been desperate to sing a gender swapped duet with your friend or show the world your Hamilton rap skills? Fancy yourself a female Fagin or adult Annie? Now is the time. Join us as we raise funds for Southampton Pride and celebrate our love of theatre.

items.summary:
After three years in Sydney, Left Leg Productions is thrilled to be back on British soil with Weird West-End! Co-Produced with The Stage Door we’ll be bringing you your favourite musical theatre anthems in weird and wonderful ways on the 8th August. 
Have you been desperate to sing a gender swapped duet with your friend or show the world your Hamilton rap skills? Fancy yourself a female Fagin or adult Annie? Now is the time. Join us as we raise funds for Southampton Pride and celebrate our love of theatre.

EOI Form link - 

https://tr.ee/CsNQvGqueY

items.text:
Die Aufmerksamkeitsspanne und das Unterhaltungniveau haben sich in den letzten 20 Jahren drastisch verändert.
Dies bedeutet für uns Trainer, dass unsere Methoden sich weiter entwickeln müssen, in Bezug auf Training mit Jugendlichen.
Da ich seit über 25 Jahren Kampfsport unterrichte, konnte ich dies sehr gut mit erleben.
Ich finde es gibt ein Zitat, was das Ganze sehr gut schildert: „entweder gehst du mit der Zeit oder du gehst mit der Zeit“.
Während des Trainings läuft bei mir grundsätzlich keine Musik, damit die Kids sich auf das Training vollständig konzentrieren.
Jedoch wenn wir unsere Langstreckenläufer machen, nehme ich ab und zu - nicht immer - meine Lautsprecher mit um den Kids ein Gefühl von Party machen, im gesunden Rahmen zu vermitteln.
Junge Menschen sehnen sich nach Aufmerksamkeit und hierfür machen sie mittlerweile die skurrilsten Sachen, um diese Aufmerksamkeit zu erlangen.
Aus pädagogischer Sicht ist es sehr wertvoll, während einer hoch konzentrierten Tätigkeit nebenbei Musik laufen zu lassen.
In unserem Fall sind die Kinder gestern mit den Eltern zusammen 6 km vor dem Training gelaufen und ich ließ einige meiner Lieblingslieder laufen 😉 (Wortspiel)
Etwas melodisches, nicht zu aggressiv, einfach ein positiver Sommervibe, der die Trainingsintensität unterstreicht.
Hierbei geht es drum ein Statement zu setzen, dass junge Menschen cool sind, wenn sie etwas für ihre Gesundheit tun und dies auch noch vor den Augen der ganzen Stadt.
Und genauso funktioniert es.
Es gibt viele perspektivlose Jugendliche, die auf Parkbänke ihre kostbare Zeit vergeuden und nicht wissen, was sie mit sich anfangen sollen.
Und dann gibt es uns; Menschen, die damit auffallen, etwas was eigentlich das Selbstverständlichste auf der Welt sein sollte.
Anstatt negative Schlagzeilen aus den Nachrichten zu rezitieren und sich seine Welt dunkler auszumalen als sie ist.
Vermitteln wir eine Botschaft von konstruktiv kollektivem Handeln.

Don‘t talk the talk, run the run 🎵 

#sensaisam #sensai_sam #sensailino #sensaisamontour #teamsensaisam

sharedPost.text:
✨ Wo Kunst auf Leben trifft. ✨

Große Geschichten leben von großen Persönlichkeiten. Mit Markus Majowski als Vetter bereichert einer der bekanntesten deutschen Schauspieler und Entertainer unser Ensemble von JEDERMANN – Das Spiel vom Sterben des reichen Mannes.

Erlebt ein bewegendes Theaterereignis voller Leidenschaft, Humor, Emotion und zeitloser Fragen über das Leben selbst.

🎭 Bremen • Coburg • Weimar • Graz • Dresden • Bayreuth

🌐  www.jedermann-theater.de⁠￼

items.text:
Gunsmoke Productions LLC now casting for the new psycho thriller film

NEEDED IMMEDIATELY:

1 Handsome and fit Caucasian Male 50s for cooperate type father with darkside (secretly sleezy) type.

1 Caucasian male 30-40 but could pass for younger in flash back scenes. Basketball player height/ athlete type.  Role of the unsuspecting killer.

EXTRAS/BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED AS WELL

African American female early 20s to pass for hs girls basketball player needed. 

Office scene background actors needed any race. 

Background of all races needed in early 20 and early 30s for senior prom scene and college party and  reunion party scenes

Caucasian Male needed for small town deputy sheriff type needed.

NON-UNION

Compensation: Residuals/royalties/profitsharing

The series will be filmed in the Upstate S.C. area.

Auditions will be held via Google Meet conference call. If you know you can not attend virtual table reads,  are not consistently available please do not reply. For more information and consideration email us at gunsmokeproductionsllc@gmail.com 

Please include 2 unfiltered face pic and 2 full body shot along with your age, contact number and current city. ABOLUTELY NO AI PICS 

SUBMISSIONS WITHOUT REQUIRED INFO AND PICS WILL NOT GET A RESPONSE

Serious inquires only. SERIOUS MEANS SERIOUS!!!

TITANIC AUDITIONS ARE IN ONE WEEK, COME AUDITION!

In Person Auditions: June 22 & 23 (5-8pm), At The Avon Free Public Library; 281 Country Club Road Avon, CT 06001, Board Room, 2nd Floor. Or Online Submission.

Come audition for the story about what happened on the Titanic. This special immersive production will be held in beautiful outdoor nautical gardens. All roles open, everyone is welcome to audition.

Rehearsals: July 7 July 8, July 12, July 21. July 22, July 28, July 29, August 4, August 5, August 9, & August 11 - 5:00 pm - 8:00 pm / Till Dusk, at 92 Pinnacle Rd, Farmington, CT 06032 (Outside Venue.)

Performance Date: August 16, 2pm. Performance Space: 92 Pinnacle Rd, Farmington, CT 06032. Volunteer, Non Union, No Travel or Board Provided.

Sign up Here: [https://forms.gle/87VRcCa6HVk4bSJ28](https://forms.gle/87VRcCa6HVk4bSJ28?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExaDU1VkJYaFNIMEQ0RHZNSXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4mtr1o0pyFedAQ6QwUXH016O1fQT0H-rBawEOu7rCiUnSPI9pwkttPnrXdjg_aem_o477k7Cxl0P-DNikT4FyYw)

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"
Wanted !!!!!
I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet. But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men 25 to 36 years old, good looking who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
CASTING CALL - **PAID ROLE** for FEMALE ACTOR / MODEL

Music Video

Date: 1 day between the dates of 21 June 2026 - 27 June 2026 (flexible)

I am looking for an actress/model for my music video for a song I will release at the beginning of July. As the song is unreleased, I will send it once I have selected an actress.

**DETAILS:**

Female - 25-35 years old - Open to all looks - Please see actor requirements below

**Location**: Around Berlin (Warschauer Str., Mitte, Kreuzberg)

**Date**: 1 day between the dates of 21 June 2026 - 27 June 2026 (flexible)

**Duration**: 1 day shoot of 5-6 hours, it will be a “run and gun” style shoot. I will have every shot planned and plan to move quickly.

**Pay**: **€4**0 flat fee, drinks and snacks provided throughout shoot

The video will be on YouTube and I will be using it for short form videos on Insta/TT/Threads etc. I can also send you a high quality copy once it is completed. 

**ACTOR DEMEANOR / REQUIREMENTS:**

The video will follow a woman who is simply enjoying living and the little things on a normal day. The actress must casually portray independence and self-appreciation with every step. The video will be following her throughout her day as she enjoys the weather, walking around Berlin, riding the subway, sitting by the canal/Spree drinking wine/coffee, reading a book, listening to music, etc. She will be speaking some of the lyrics throughout the video, but not performing them. She will say them as if she is thinking positively and talking to herself with a smirk.

The song is called “Learned That Day” and is about how someone had an intense experience in a relationship that fell apart. But she has persevered and found herself to be more capable than ever.

Here is a video I released in March. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oA-zzkNhJT8&list=RDoA-zzkNhJT8&start_radio=1&pp=ygUPcGhpbGJldHRlcmJlYXRzoAcB](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oA-zzkNhJT8&list=RDoA-zzkNhJT8&start_radio=1&pp=ygUPcGhpbGJldHRlcmJlYXRzoAcB)

However, the video for "Learned That Day” will have a more casual vibe with no direct performance shots.

Please email headshots, Instagram handle, and a reel if you have one to the email below. Feel free to send any questions if you have them.

CONTACT: 

Email: philbettermusic@gmail.com

Instagram: @PhilBetter

Thank you and have a great week!

Philip / PhilBetter

sharedPost.text:
🌎INTERNATIONAL DANCE COMPETITION GERMANY 🌏
presents the event schedule for the 2026/2027 season:
💎Dance Diamonds💎 October 3–4, 2026, at Stadthalle Kleve. Registration is open now through September 20, 2026: www.art-element.de/registration-competition
🌟This dance competition is open to amateur dancers ranging from the 10-year-old age category up to the Open age class.
🌟Participation is available in the following categories: Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group, and Group.
🌟The competition encompasses a wide variety of dance styles. Furthermore, it is designed to accommodate performers or dance groups at various levels of preparation.

💎Dance Diamonds Kids💎 December 19–20, 2026, at Stadthalle Hückelhoven. Registration is open from October 1, 2026, to December 6, 2026.
www.art-element.de/dance-diamonds
🌟This competition is organized specifically for young performers aged 3 to 12. 🌟Participation takes place in the categories of Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group, and Group.
🌟Additionally, participants are divided into different categories based on their level of preparation, whether they are individual performers or dance groups. 💥"Dance Prodigy"💥 March 6–7, 2027, at Stadthalle Hückelhoven. Registration is open from November 1, 2026, to February 10, 2027.
www.art-element.de/danceprodigy
🔥The competition features a unique format, incorporating audiovisual multimedia stage design.
⚡️The project places great emphasis on dance as a performing art; the media-art stage design enhances the dramatic impact of each choreography, presenting the performance through a contemporary aesthetic.
🌟The competition is open to participants of all ages—specifically groups of three or more performers—and showcases a variety of dance styles.
⚡️Participants and dance groups are categorized according to their respective levels of experience and preparation.

🛎Visit www.art-element.de for detailed information about our team, our projects and event programs, and our archives.

✨️If you have any further questions, please feel free to contact us by phone or WhatsApp at 0049-15773131438.
♥️Our team looks forward to your participation in our dance competitions!🏆

textReferences.short_name: The Audition House, London casting & creative studios

sharedPost.text:
Ready to go deeper?

The Actors Gym: Emotion & Script — this one will change how you work.

Three intensive sessions. Real technique. Truthful acting.

📅 Tuesdays 7, 14 & 21 July
⏰ 11am – 2pm
📍 Audition House
Led by The Official Meisner School in London, this workshop will help you stop performing and start living truthfully in your scenes.

Limited spaces. Don’t sleep on it.

👉 Book via email hello@meisnerlondon.com

#ActorsGym #MeisnerLondon #ActingWorkshop #MeisnerTechnique #LondonActors EmotionAndScript ActingClass AuditionHouse BehaveTruthfully

items.text: Oferuję montaż demo aktorskiego, według aktualnych wymogów reżyserów obsady. Szczegóły w opisie i na priv :) 🎬

sharedPost.text:
🎥 Montaż demo aktorskiego z konsultacją 

Potrzebujesz demo aktorskiego, które pokaże Twój talent aktorski i wszechstronność a jednocześnie będzie zgodne z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu? Chcesz dowiedzieć się jak pobierać materiały i jak tworzyć takie demo samemu w przyszłości w łatwy sposób oraz jak zwiększyć swoje szanse na konkretną role? Jeżeli tak to zapraszam do skorzystania z mojej usługi 🙂 

✅ dokładnie przejrzę Twoje aktorskie materiały, wybiorę najlepsze aktorsko sceny oraz różnorodne pod względem emocji i ról

✅ zmontuję demo zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu uwzględniając również to, które sceny Ty uważasz za najlepsze 

✅ podczas konsultacji opowiem Ci o obecnych standardach montażu i doboru scen, dam dużo cennych rad abyś mogła / mógł w przyszłości montować demo samodzielnie 

✅ gotowe demo dostaniesz ode mnie maksymalnie w 2 dni od wysłania mi swoich materiałów

✅ przystępna cena 💵 szczegóły na priv 

Na zdjęciach załączam jedną z wiadomość od klienta po moim montażu 🔥💪 

Uwaga! Nie zajmuję się pobieraniem materiałów.

items.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak oferuję: 
🎬mentoring aktorski 
🎬nagranie wizytówek w Warszawie
🎬montaż demo aktorskiego zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów obsady 

Szczegóły w opisie i na priv :)

sharedPost.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak - zapraszam na konsultacje do mnie, nagranie wizytówek i montaż demo aktorskiego! 🎬🤩 Szczegóły w opisie! 

🎥 Mentoring aktorski 

Dla kogo? 

Dla każdego kto chce pracować jako aktor/aktorka na planach zdjęciowych. Zarówno dla tych bez doświadczenia, któryórzy nie wiedzą jak zacząć i co zrobić jak i dla tych co już pierwsze kroki mają za sobą ale chcieliby mieć więcej pracy i potrzebują rady w tym zakresie 🙂 

Na czym polega? 

Spotkanie ze mną 1:1 online, trwające godzinę. Opowiesz mi jakie zlecenia aktorskie Cię interesują - czyli Twój aktorski cel i według tego dobieramy odpowiedni plan działania. Jeżeli masz materiały aktorskie - to je omówimy i powiem co warto byłoby jeszcze do nich dodać lub jak je “podrasować”. Jeżeli nie masz to dowiesz się co i jak masz zrobić żeby je mieć 🙂 Powiem o moich poleceniach agencji aktorskich, jak samodzielnie i łatwo zrobić demo, jak nagrać i co powiedzieć w wizytówkach, jak samodzielnie szukać pracy, jak się wyceniać, na co uważać. I odpowiem na wszystkie inne Twoje pytania. Po spotkaniu otrzymasz ode mnie maila z planem działania i priorytetami do wykonania + materiałami pomocniczymi dot. materiałów aktorskich. 

🎥 Coaching aktorski z wizytówki + nagranie wizytówek w studio 

Na czym polega? 

✅ Tworzę tekst do wizytówek na podstawie informacji o Twoim doświadczeniu, pasjach, zainteresowaniach, który dostajesz przed nagraniem według castingowych wytycznych, który pokaże Twoje największe atuty

✅W studio nagrań nagrywamy 3-4 wizytówki:

🎬 do filmów i seriali 
🎬 do reklam w wersji dłuższej 
🎬 do reklam w wersji krótszej 
🎬 w języku obcym 
Ewentualnie możemy dograć wizytówkę modelingową 

✅ W trakcie nagrywania zadbam o Twoje rozluźnienie, dobrą atmosferę oraz zrobimy kilka ćwiczeń które pomogą pokazać na wizytówkach Twoją energię i błysk w oku 
oraz będę czuwać nad całym procesem

✅ Wizytówki nagramy według aktualnych standardów i wymogów castingowych 

✅ Dostaniesz zmontowane wizytówki gotowe do wysłania przez WeTransfer

🎥 Demo aktorskie 

montaż demo aktorskiego + konsultacja 

Na czym polega? 

✅ otrzymasz ode mnie demo aktorskie zmontowane zgodnie z obecnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu + podczas konsultacji wspólnie dobierzemy sceny, które się w nim znajdą oraz przedstawię Ci mój pomysł na ich kolejność 

Podczas konsultacji dowiesz się również:

✅ jak pobierać materiały do demo aktorskiego 
✅ jakie są obecne wymogi i standardy wzgledem aktorskiego demo 
✅ jakie sceny wybierać i w jakiej kolejności je zmontować  
✅ jak samemu w łatwy sposób przemontować demo pod konkretny casting 

Szczegóły priv

items.summary: Looking for a well known character actor in South Wales!
items.title: Looking for a well known character actor in South Wales!

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Do people regularly tell you that you know far too much about one particular subject?

Can you identify every Premier League winner? 

Recite obscure historical facts? 

Explain astrophysics over a pint? 

Name every Bond film in order? 

Remember things nobody else seems to know?

We're currently casting for a social-first content campaign for a major new learning and knowledge brand launching in the UK.

We're looking for people based in London with exceptional knowledge, strong personalities and a competitive streak.

We're particularly interested in:

• Quiz champions and pub quiz regulars
• Lecturers, teachers and academics
• Sports experts and fanatics
• History enthusiasts
• Science and technology experts
• Pop culture specialists
• People with unusual or niche specialist subjects
• General knowledge obsessives

The campaign will follow a hand-picked team as they take on some of London's best pub quizzes throughout July, alongside a series of knowledge-based challenges and filmed content.

Think competitive, funny, social and slightly ridiculous.

We're looking for people who:

• Have genuine expertise or deep knowledge in a subject area
• Are comfortable on camera
• Have strong personalities and enjoy a challenge
• Are based in London
• Are available for multiple filming dates throughout July

This is a paid opportunity.

To apply, please send:

• A short introduction about yourself
• Your specialist subject(s)
• Any relevant social media profiles
• Why you'd be a great addition to the team

If you're the person your friends always want on their pub quiz team, we'd love to hear from you.

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
Paid opportunity:

A friend of mine is looking for energetic, expressive people to take part in a fun, unscripted improv session (used internally, not broadcast anywhere)

£60 for 3h in Bermondsey, London.

You can pick any 3h slot that suits you, even after work and on the weekend.

Please share your email (either here or DMs), so I can send over more details. Thank you

topComments.text: This is absolutely me all over and I’m only in Deptford. I would love more details

items.title: Paid opportunity:

items.text:
Hey everyone,

I’ve got a few projects in post-production coming out this year and it’s got me thinking  how tough it can be for many to break into this industry. I’ve been the lead in two Netflix series, Hemlock Grove and DOTA: Dragon’s Blood, worked on Once Upon a Time, and worked alongside Bill Skarsgård and Jean-Claude Van Damme, to name a few. One thing I’ve learned is that talent is only part of it.

If you’re interested in getting an agent or breaking into TV and film, I can help through my mentorship.

Feel free to message me anytime 😊

Warmest,
Freya

If interested, please get in touch via Facebook (here) or through the un.saidarchive Instagram account.

This is a profit-share project, with both actors and the director receiving a share of any profits.

To learn more about the play before applying, you can view the show’s listing here:
https://camdenfringe.com/events/love-you-to-amsemsam-and-back/

items.text:
CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM (CINEMA) 

URGENT: More submissions needed for LIZ & Andre

Shoot begins August (exact dates TBC). 
Day rate £300 + expenses. Locations: Birmingham + other UK areas. 

Please email Farhan Baqi at farhan.baqi@mcccuk.co.uk with 2 photos or a Spotlight link, and make sure to put the character name in the subject line (saves me hours 😛). 

These roles have multiple shoot dates and are not one‑liners, so we are looking for experienced or trained actors. 

LIZ (18–24): Ginger‑haired British Caucasian girl, fun, confident, outgoing, loyal, courageous, protective of friends; must have or convincingly perform a Birmingham/West Midlands accent; musical background a bonus. (If you are happy to dye the hair then please do apply)

ANDRE (18–24): Black/African‑British, Male. third‑generation Caribbean heritage, charismatic with strong rhythm and natural performance energy; musical background preferred
But not essential 

Thank you.
FB
MCCC

items.text:
URGENT

SOUND RECORDIST NEEDED - LONDON - DUE TO DROP OUT.

We need a sound recordist with their own equipment, who is able to work on a fast paced film set.

DATES - 28/29/30 June and 8th and 11th July.

PROJECT - A beautiful, cinematic short film about loss, grief, alcoholism, recovery and love.

FEE - No fee collaboration, but all travel expenses within London will be reimbursed 2 weeks after the filming finishes.

There are other projects we are doing this year which you will be offered too!

Please only apply if you can fully commit to all dates.

We are a super fun, hard working team, who live for bringing original work to life.

We know that travel expenses only projects aren’t for everyone, so if this isn’t for you, please just scroll on instead of leaving hateful comments.

For more about us and reviews on what it’s like to work with us, please go to www.distortedrebels.com

To apply, please DM us or send us an email to info@distortedrebels.com

Thank you!
Phoenix 
Distorted Rebels Productions

items.text:
**Może czas wykorzystać swoją energię w nowym formacie? ✨**

Szukamy osób z doświadczeniem w animacji, eventach, obsłudze klienta, sporcie, tańcu lub podobnych obszarach.

Jeśli dobrze czujesz się w kontakcie z ludźmi i potrafisz tworzyć atmosferę — **możesz odnaleźć się w roli instruktora ruchu i tańca w Arthur Murray!**

Nie musisz mieć doświadczenia w prowadzeniu zajęć tanecznych — wszystkiego nauczymy Cię krok po kroku.

**Co zyskujesz?**
🎓 pełne szkolenie od początku
🌍 rozwój w międzynarodowej sieci
👥 klientów od studia
📈 jasną ścieżkę rozwoju
💃 codzienny kontakt z ludźmi, ruchem i emocjami
💰 wynagrodzenie 6500–9000 zł

📍 Wrocław / Warszawa

**Brzmi jak coś dla Ciebie?**
📩 Wyślij CV: arthurmurray.hr@gmail.com
📞 WhatsApp: +48 574 780 210

items.text:
Zostały jeszcze dwie role do obsadzenia:

1. Eliza około 33 lat.
Jest to główna rola także proszę osoby z dużym doświadczeniem na planie.
Terminy zdjęć 21,22,23 czerwca.

2. Mateusz około 32 lat.
Epizodyczna rola na 21 oraz 23 czerwca. 
Odnośnie Mateusza proszę tylko osoby z Wrocławia i okolic.

Zdjęcia odbędą się we Wrocławiu.
Produkcja Trudne Sprawy. 
Wynagrodzenie za rolę jak i zwrot kosztów podróży płatne gotówką na planie. Hotel na koszt firmy. 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na emial adres 
adrian.zarzecki@polotmedia.pl z informacją wiek, jakie doświadczenie na planie, aktualne zdjęcia i numer tel.

Można też napisać komentarz pod postem.
Postaram odezwać się do każdego kandydata.

Do zobaczenia na planie ;)

Zostały jeszcze dwie role do obsadzenia:

1. Eliza około 33 lat.
Jest to główna rola także proszę osoby z dużym doświadczeniem na planie.
Terminy zdjęć 21,22,23 czerwca.

2. Mateusz około 32 lat.
Epizodyczna rola na 21 oraz 23 czerwca. 
Odnośnie Mateusza proszę tylko osoby z Wrocławia i okolic.

Zdjęcia odbędą się we Wrocławiu.
Produkcja Trudne Sprawy. 
Wynagrodzenie za rolę jak i zwrot kosztów podróży płatne gotówką na planie. Hotel na koszt firmy. 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na emial adres 
adrian.zarzecki@polotmedia.pl z informacją wiek, jakie doświadczenie na planie, aktualne zdjęcia i numer tel.

Można też napisać komentarz pod postem.
Postaram odezwać się do każdego kandydata.

Do zobaczenia na planie ;)

items.text:
Casting Call - NYC Short

ISO of 2 Black men (20s-early 30s) for a dialogue driven short set in a NYC deli, (Harlem, Washington heights or Brooklyn) 

📍NYC Area
🎥Non-Union *independent/solo*
1 Day shoot (approx- 3-5 hours)
🗓️ TBD *iso of delis that would give permission to shoot*
💰Compensation - $100 + meal/snacks, footage, & credit provided. 

Project-
Two stylish NYers debate the Knicks, Jay-Z, Drake, art, legacy and what makes a moment worth remembering while ordering sandwiches at a neighborhood deli before sitting at a bus stop. 

Think: 
Harlem meets Brooklyn 
Tyler, the Creator + A$ap Rocky
Intelligent, funny, conversational
Natural chemistry and improvisational energy encouraged.

Roles:
MALIK (Lead)
Black male, 20s-early 30s

Creative. Observant. Thoughtful. The kind of person who sees meaning in everything. Speaks with confidence and curiosity. Equal parts film student, poet, and neighborhood philosopher. 

ZION (Lead)
Black male, 20s-early 30s

Charismatic. Sharp. Competitive. Loves sports, music, and a good debate. Grounded, funny, and quick on his feet. The type to challenge every point just because he enjoys the conversation. 

Looking for actors who feel authentic to NYC culture and can move naturally between humor, intellect, and everyday conversations; distinctive fashion style aesthetics of Jordan Poole, Tyrese Haliburton, Devin Booker combined with the freeness/energy of Tyler the Creator.

Submissions: 
Headshot
Resume (if available)
Reel or self-tape 
Social handle (optional)

Can send it to Anaselenax@gmail.com!

items.text:
Documentary Casting:

Looking for some interviews for a documentary! Here's who I'm looking to talk to:

-anyone who had fake social media accounts using their photos
-AI-generated images or videos using their likeness
-Unauthorized use of headshots or promotional images
-Deepfake content
-Voice cloning
-Online impersonation
-Someone using their photos without permission
-Catfishing or identity theft
-Scam attempts involving fake voices or videos
-Harassment involving altered or manipulated images
-Concerns about how AI and digital technology may affect personal privacy
-Concerns about AI scanning, digital replicas, or ownership of their image and likeness

You don't need to have a dramatic story or be involved in a legal case. I'm simply interested in learning how these technologies are affecting people working in the entertainment industry and hearing about personal experiences.

If this sounds like something you've experienced, please send me an email with a little information about yourself and your experience. 

All interviews will take place July 22-24 in Los Angeles. They are one hour long, on camera, and paid. 

Please email me at stolenfacesdoc@gmail.com with a little about yourself and your story. Please no requests for crew or anything else. Thanks!

-Vanessa

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL -  **Girls' Night Out Short Film
## **We are casting for Girls’ Night Out, a cinematic short film about five Black women from five African nations navigating one Friday evening together in Vancouver, BC. Each woman carries something invisible into the night. What they find in each other is what no institution could provide. The film is strictly volunteer based, targeting festival submissions. This is a portfolio piece for everyone involved.**

**We are currently looking for:**
**LEAD ROLES — All five must be women of African descent (OPEN TO ALL BLACK ACTRESSES)**

**AMARA – Western African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Sharp, always in motion, a code-switcher. Works in marketing and communications. Must be comfortable switching between Nigerian pidgin and a neutral Canadian accent.**

**NIA – Western African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Medical student. Exhausted and brilliant.**

**ZURI – Southern African woman, late 20s to early 30s. The anchor. Decisive, warm, composed. Social worker. Needs to know how to drive**

**IMANI – Southern African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Playful, chaotic, observant. DJ.**

**TONI – East African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Athletic build. A bit of a tomboy. Software engineer. Private.**

**SUPPORTING ROLES & EXTRAS**

**We are intentionally casting to reflect the demographic reality of Vancouver, a city built on Indigenous land and home to one of the most diverse populations in the world. We are particularly interested in hearing from:**

**Black performers**
**Indigenous performers**
**East Asian and South Asian performers**
**White performers**

**For supporting and background roles, all backgrounds are welcome to submit.**

**No acting experience required. If you have never acted before but feel connected to one of these characters please submit. We are looking for truth, not technique.**

**This is an unpaid production (screen credit provided). Food will be provided on set. Some scenes require emotional depth, multiple takes, and reshoots.**

**To submit please send the following to: gnothefilm@gmail.com**

**Headshot or clear selfie**
**Short video introducing yourself (30–60 seconds, just talk to us, INCLUDE: NAME, HEIGHT, LOCATION UNION STATUS & CULTURAL BACKGROUND)**
**Reel or any acting experience if available**
**Which role you are submitting for**
**Your contact information and location**

**Filming in Vancouver, BC Late August 2026. Even if you are not submitting, please share this with someone who might be. Every share helps us find the right people.**

items.summary:
# **CASTING CALL -  **Girls' Night Out Short Film
## **We are casting for Girls’ Night Out, a cinematic short film about five Black women from five African nations navigating one Friday evening together in Vancouver, BC. Each woman carries something invisible into the night. What they find in each other is what no institution could provide. The film is strictly volunteer based, targeting festival submissions. This is a portfolio piece for everyone involved.**

**We are currently looking for:**
**LEAD ROLES — All five must be women of African descent (OPEN TO ALL BLACK ACTRESSES)**

**AMARA – Western African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Sharp, always in motion, a code-switcher. Works in marketing and communications. Must be comfortable switching between Nigerian pidgin and a neutral Canadian accent.**

**NIA – Western African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Medical student. Exhausted and brilliant.**

**ZURI – Southern African woman, late 20s to early 30s. The anchor. Decisive, warm, composed. Social worker. Needs to know how to drive**

**IMANI – Southern African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Playful, chaotic, observant. DJ.**

**TONI – East African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Athletic build. A bit of a tomboy. Software engineer. Private.**

**SUPPORTING ROLES & EXTRAS**

**We are intentionally casting to reflect the demographic reality of Vancouver, a city built on Indigenous land and home to one of the most diverse populations in the world. We are particularly interested in hearing from:**

**Black performers**
**Indigenous performers**
**East Asian and South Asian performers**
**White performers**

**For supporting and background roles, all backgrounds are welcome to submit.**

**No acting experience required. If you have never acted before but feel connected to one of these characters please submit. We are looking for truth, not technique.**

**This is an unpaid production (screen credit provided). Food will be provided on set. Some scenes require emotional depth, multiple takes, and reshoots.**

**To submit please send the following to: gnothefilm@gmail.com**

**Headshot or clear selfie**
**Short video introducing yourself (30–60 seconds, just talk to us, INCLUDE: NAME, HEIGHT, LOCATION UNION STATUS & CULTURAL BACKGROUND)**
**Reel or any acting experience if available**
**Which role you are submitting for**
**Your contact information and location**

**Filming in Vancouver, BC Late August 2026. Even if you are not submitting, please share this with someone who might be. Every share helps us find the right people.**
items.title: # **CASTING CALL -  **Girls' Night Out Short Film

items.text:
**CASTING CALL **- "PULSE" Short Film // Non-Union

**Compensation**: Unpaid/Volunteer, Lunch and Crafty Provided

**Location**: Vancouver, BC 

**Shoot Date:** Single Day, Late June/Early July 

**Synopsis**: Chris, an inexperienced superhero known as Pulse, decides he must reveal his secret identity to his girlfriend Rachel, but struggles to find the right way, as the two of them debate the methods of this “reckless hero” over dinner.

If interested, please submit headshots, resume and/or demo reel to: **pulseshortfilm.edc@gmail.com**

SUBMISSION DEADLINE: June 24th, 2026

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 25/2026

EIN KULTKLASSIKER WIRD 25, THEATERHIGHLIGHT IN RADLBRUNN UND DER ÜBERRASCHUNGSHIT AUS DEN USA

Der mit Spannung erwartete Horrorfilm „Backrooms“ feiert Kinopremiere. Der Film basiert auf der bekannten Creepypasta- und YouTube-Webserie.

Die Bühne Weinviertel bringt das bekannte Theaterstück „Der Bockerer“  im Sommer 2026 als Wiederaufnahme auf die Freiluftbühne im historischen Brandlhof in Radlbrunn. Die Hauptrolle des Wiener Fleischhauers Karl Bockerer übernimmt Intendant Christoph Stich, den unsere Moderatorin Sarah Fuchs dazu ausführlich befragte.

Was 2001 als packender Undercover-Krimi in der Tuning-Szene von Los Angeles begann, ist heute mit zehn Hauptfilmen und über sieben Milliarden US-Dollar Einspielergebnis eines der erfolgreichsten Kino-Universen der Welt. Die Reihe hat die globale Autokultur, Musik und das Popkultur-Verständnis von „Family“ nachhaltig geprägt. Anlässlich dieses Anniversary gibts den Soundtrack zu THE FAST AND FURIOUS in der Sendung zu hören.

Mittwoch 17.6.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

CASTING CALL: Westhead

We are casting for THREE main roles for an upcoming short film to be filmed in Salford over 3-4 days in July 2026.

The film will be a part of the University of Salford MA Film Production: Major Project module. Written and directed by Hervey Bracken.

Please read the slides above for information on auditions via self-tape. Please share to actors who may be interested.

Email for more details.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting call Westhead Synopsis: Charlie. a teenage boy, is kicked out of school after a fight. He then must grapple with the repercussions and where he can go next. A film exploring neurodiversity in a UK school system. Filming in Salford/Manchester w/c 13th July-- or --W/c 20th July 2026 University of Salford MA Film Production short film Unpaid role as this is a student project but hoping to offer funds for travel and food. Contact: poemadjacentproductions@gmail.com for more information n auditions via self-tape. Please include character name in subject line. Deadline lune 29th.'

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
🎬 Huge congratulations to our talented adult actor Jonny on securing a role in an upcoming feature film through our talent agency. 

Many of you will also know Jonny as our very own Dewey Finn (Jack Black) in School of Rock. We are incredibly proud of his achievement and can’t wait to see him shine on the big screen and stage.

Why not come and see Jonny live in action at the Storyhouse Theatre, Chester from 13th-15th August as he leads our fantastic cast in School of Rock🎸🤘

Well done, Jonny - here’s to many more exciting opportunities ahead!

#FeatureFilm #SchoolOfRock #StoryhouseTheatre #Chester #MajesticAcademy

items.text:
Do kolejnych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Mężczyzna 1 (27) – kryminalista. Dobrze zbudowany. 
Data: 03. lipca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

2. Beniek (28) – Gangus poszukiwany listem gończym. Typ ryzykanta, który najpierw działa, potem myśli. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY !!!
Data: 02. lipca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

3. Dawid Górecki (35) – złodziej samochodów. W dobrej formie, opanowany, rozsądny.  KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY !!!
Data: 02. lipca
Stawka: 600 zł netto 

4. Dawid Kowara (37) – bandyta średniego szczebla, trochę mniej bystry. Silny, przypakowany. Lubi przestępcze życie, zawsze chętny do działania więc ma sporo za uszami, ale poza odsiedzianym wyrokiem 3 lata za wymuszenie nic mu nie udowodniono.  
Data: 29. i 30. czerwca
Stawka: 1400 zł za całość 

5. Albert Moński (39) – bandyta średniego szczebla, dość przenikliwy, zdecydowany w działaniu. Sprawny fizycznie ale nie kafar. W przeszłości dostał 5 lat za rozbój. W więzieniu bardzo się wycwanił, dlatego po wyjściu nic mu już nigdy nie udowodniono. Energiczny w zachowaniu (pada w tekście). KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY !!!
Data: 29. i 30. czerwca
Stawka: 1400 zł za całość 

6. Mężczyzna 2 (40) – sprawny fizycznie.
Data: 03. lipca
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

sharedPost.text:
Judith Uchechukwu Moghalu is her real name before she adopted the stage name
Judy Austin.
She is from Umuoji in Anambra State. We have two children together. Sometimes I ask myself, ‘Wetin man do man?’
Anytime we were watching Nollywood movies and Yul Edochie appeared on screen, Judy would lose concentration.
She would openly tell me she loved Yul and praise him.
She also used to say that Yul Edochie’s voice reminded her of her uncle, Chinedu.
I have four pieces of evidence that they were dating under my roof.”
- Mr. Obasi, Judy Austin’s former husband, became emotional during an interview as he presented photos and other materials which he says are evidence of their marriage. #trendy #nigeria

🎙️ I CAN’T MAKE THIS UP

items.text:
# **[KRAKÓW] CASTING NA PROWADZĄCEGO / WSPÓŁTWÓRCĘ PODCASTU WIDEO**

Szukam charyzmatycznego prowadzącego do autorskiego podcastu w Krakowie. Ty dostarczasz wizerunek, wiedzę i pomysł, ja zapewniam pełne zaplecze produkcyjne. Szukam partnera, a nie klienta do wynajęcia studia.

Jesteś aktorem/aktorką, świetnie czujesz się przed kamerą i masz nienaganną dykcję, ale oprócz tego masz unikalną wiedzę, pasję (niekoniecznie związaną z aktorstwem!) i znasz swoją niszę od podszewki? Świetnie. Ja dysponuję w Krakowie w pełni wyposażonym, profesjonalnym studiem wideo (wielokamerowy system na pełnoklatkowych aparatach Lumix, miksery ATEM, profesjonalne oświetlenie) oraz twardym technicznym know-how.

Połączmy te dwa kapitały. Stwórzmy format oparty na idealnej synergii i bezkompromisowej jakości.

**Jak wygląda nasz podział ról?**
* **Twoja działka (Wizerunek, Charyzma i Merytoryka):** Jesteś twarzą, głosem i mózgiem operacyjnym w kwestii treści. Wykorzystujesz swój warsztat przed kamerą, ale wchodzisz do studia i skupiasz się wyłącznie na tym, w czym jesteś absolutnym ekspertem. Zapraszasz wartościowych gości, prowadzisz rozmowy, dzielisz się wiedzą i budujesz społeczność wokół formatu.
* **Moja działka (Technologia i Zaplecze):** Pełnię rolę Twojego technicznego wspólnika i producenta. Biorę na siebie 100% procesów realizacyjnych. Odpowiadam za wielokamerową realizację obrazu, zaawansowany montaż i profesjonalną obróbkę dźwięku (DaVinci Resolve). Wycinam z naszych nagrań dynamiczne formaty pionowe (TikTok, Reels, Shorts), optymalizuję je i ogarniam techniczną stronę dystrybucji.

**Model biznesowy (Zasady 50/50):** Gramy do jednej bramki. Nie płacisz mi z góry za wynajem studia ani za montaż. Budujemy wspólne przedsięwzięcie i dzielimy się zyskami z monetyzacji (przychody z YouTube, wsparcie od widzów przez Patronite, kontrakty sponsorskie, lokowania, a w przyszłości własne produkty) dokładnie po połowie. Dzielimy ryzyko i dzielimy sukces.

Zależy mi na osobie, która podchodzi do biznesu z pełnym profesjonalizmem, ma na siebie konkretny pomysł i potrafi konsekwentnie działać. Żeby sprawdzić nasze biznesowe dopasowanie i chemię przed kamerą, zrobimy na start 4-odcinkowy sezon pilotażowy (Proof of Concept). Zobaczymy, jak współpracuje nam się w praktyce.

**CZEGO WYMAGAM NA START (Przeczytaj uważnie):**

Jeśli widzisz w tym potencjał, wyślij mi wiadomość prywatną. Oczekuję jednak maksymalnego konkretu. Twoja aplikacja musi precyzyjnie i w szczegółach opisywać:
1. **Format i tematykę:** Jaki dokładnie podcast chcesz prowadzić i do kogo docelowo ma trafiać?
2. **Twarde kompetencje:** Dlaczego to właśnie Ty masz o tym mówić? Samo wykształcenie aktorskie to za mało – wymagam jasnego potwierdzenia ekspertyzy w wybranym temacie (poparte dowodami: doświadczenie zawodowe, zrealizowane projekty, konkretne zainteresowania).
3. **Bazę gości:** Czy masz własną sieć kontaktów, znajomych lub współpracowników z danej branży, których od razu będziesz w stanie zaprosić do udziału w projekcie w charakterze gości?

**Ważna uwaga na koniec:** Szanujmy swój czas. Jeśli Twoja wiadomość nie będzie precyzyjna i zabraknie w niej szczegółów dotyczących Twojego pomysłu, kompetencji oraz konkretnego zakresu działania – nie odpiszę.

Czekam na profesjonalne propozycje na priv.

items.text:
NOWY PROGRAM KULINARNY ZGŁOŚ SIĘ JUŻ DZIŚ!
Lubisz gotować? Gotowanie to Twoja pasja?

Szukamy uczestników do nowego programu kulinarnego. Mile widziane są osoby, które po raz pierwszy chcą spróbować swoich sił przed kamerami.

Jeśli gotowanie sprawia Ci przyjemność, czekamy właśnie na Ciebie. 

Na uczestników czekają nagrody!

Napisz do mnie w wiadomości prywatnej, a opowiem o szczegółach.

Zuza

🎬🎥✅🤩Do epizodu w serialu poszukuję chłopca w wieku 5-6 lat (może być starszy, ale niskiego wzrostu).

Wymagana dobra znajomość języka angielskiego – rola z kwestiami mówionymi.

 Stawka: 1000 zł brutto za dzień zdjęciowy 💗

 Dni zdjęciowe: 2 dni

Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać na adres e-mail - tatianamakhdi@gmail.com 

Wiadomość powinna zawierać:

 Imię i nazwisko dziecka

 Wiek oraz wzrost

 Numer telefonu do opiekuna

 Aktualne zdjęcia

 Obowiązkowo: wizytówkę wideo (self-tape) w języku angielskim (koniecznie)

items.text:
FEMALE RAPPER WANTED – MULTIPLE MUSIC PROJECTS
We are looking for a talented female rapper to collaborate on multiple upcoming music releases.

Requirements:

- Female, aged 18–40

- Able to record high-quality vocals from home and send stems/files remotely

- Available for music video shoots

- Strong rap delivery with confidence and personality

- Ideally based in or around Birmingham, although applications from other locations will be considered

Payment

Payment will be discussed with the successful applicant.

To Apply

Please send:

- An audio recording of your rap vocals and/or a music video

- A recent photo

- Any relevant social media or music links

Email: 

nadekmusic@gmail.com

If selected, there is potential for ongoing collaboration across multiple future projects.

items.text:
Actor needed for a SHORT THRILLER SERIES

Film title: " BLUNDER "

Production: Orbitec Studios
Director/Producer: Bedeyuri “Yuri” Fernandes
Location: London, UK
Format: Short Episodic Series (4–5 minutes per episode)
Genre: Psychological Thriller / Drama
Shoot Schedule: Weekends (1-day shoots per episode)

LOGLINE
A routine birthday gathering turns into a psychological trap when a mysterious package arrives at the wrong address—uncovering hidden identities, controlled manipulation, and a deadly sequence already set in motion.

SYNOPSIS
What begins as a simple night among friends quickly unravels into something far more dangerous.
When Fred receives an unexpected package, curiosity gets the better of him. But opening it triggers a chain reaction that none of them understand—and none of them can stop.
As tension rises inside the room, loyalties fracture and truths emerge. One of them is hiding something. Another is not who they seem. And the man who arrives to retrieve the package isn’t there to negotiate.
What feels like a mistake… begins to reveal itself as something designed. 

BLUNDER is a contained, high-tension psychological thriller exploring control, identity, and the consequences of a single decision.

FRED (Male, late 20s–mid 30s) — LEAD
Natural, grounded, relatable.
Must carry a strong emotional arc: relaxed - curious - unsettled - fearful -  

If you are interested, please reach me out. 

Shooting on August 8th and 9th - rehearsal on August 1st.

Many thanks 

Yuri

items.text:
🎬Here it comes! A great opportunity for film lovers and aspiring filmmakers. 🎬

 

Pattaya Short Film Competition 2026

On the theme of “Sustainability”

By Designed Areas for Sustainable Tourism Administration (DASTA)

Compete for total prizes worth THB 340,000 (approximately USD 10,388)

**Competition Guidelines**

**1.Competition Theme**

 “Sustainability”

Through short films, participants are invited to tell stories reflecting the concept of sustainability in all its dimensions, including the environment, society, culture, community, economy, relationships, love, peace, and quality of life. Participants are encouraged to shoot in any location and present their stories from diverse perspectives to inspire audiences to help create a more livable, warm, peaceful, and sustainable world for everyone.

**2. Qualifications of Short Film Competition Applicants**

The general public without restrictions on gender, age, nationality or educational qualifications. Participants may submit applications either individually or as a team. However, individuals, working groups involved in the organization of the competition, and members of the judging committee are prohibited from entering the competition.

 *Note: Each team may submit only one film, and team members’ names must not be duplicated across different teams.

**3. Competition Details**

The competition is divided into three rounds as follows

3.1 The first preliminary round: The selection based on a plot submission. Applicants are required to submit a film title and a plot of no more than one A4 page in length. Plots must be submitted in PDF format. The application opens from **today until July 5th, 2026.**

3.2 Second Round of the Competition: Participants who pass the preliminary round are required to produce a short film that is consistent with their submitted plots and within the specified content framework. The short film must have a duration of not less than 5 minutes and not more than 10 minutes, including the opening project title and the closing credits. The official logo of the Designated Areas for Sustainable Tourism Administration (DASTA) must be included in either the opening or closing credits of the work. The short film submission for this round opens from **July 10****th**** – 31****st****, 2026.**

**4. Competition Prizes**

4.1 The competition is divided into two categories.

4.1.1 Thai Language Short Film

1. Winner                  

50,000 THB (approx. 1,528 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

2. First runner up        

30,000 THB (approx. 917 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

3. Second runner up   

20,000 THB (approx. 611 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

4.1.2 Foreign Language Short Film

1. Winner                  

50,000 THB (approx. 1,528 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

2. First runner up        

30,000 THB (approx. 917 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

3. Second runner up   

20,000 THB (approx. 611 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

 14 Honorable mention awards: 10,000 THB (approx. 306 USD) with certificates

A total of 20 awards, with an aggregate prize value of 340,000 THB (approx. 10,3877 USD)

**5. Judging Committee**

Mr. Prachya Pinkaew, distinguished committee, chair of the judging committee and film director, along with several other distinguished experts.

opens from **today until** **July 5****th****, 2026.**

The application via Google Form

**The application form for Thai language short film**
[https://forms.gle/i8Qnkx6pVXmNqFcT8](https://forms.gle/i8Qnkx6pVXmNqFcT8)

**The application form for foreign language short film**
[https://forms.gle/C6BWqZM1AbKQegqd6](https://forms.gle/C6BWqZM1AbKQegqd6)

For more information, inquiries and updates please visit “ประกวดหนังสั้น” Facebook Page[https://www.facebook.com/shortfilmcontest101](https://www.facebook.com/shortfilmcontest101) 
Email: dastafilmcontest4@gmail.com

The short film submission for this round opens from **July 10****th**** – 31****st****, 2026.**

**4. Competition Prizes**

4.1 The competition is divided into two categories.

4.1.1 Thai Language Short Film

1. Winner                  

50,000 THB (approx. 1,528 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

2. First runner up        

30,000 THB (approx. 917 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

3. Second runner up   

20,000 THB (approx. 611 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

4.1.2 Foreign Language Short Film

1. Winner                  

50,000 THB (approx. 1,528 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

2. First runner up        

30,000 THB (approx. 917 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

3. Second runner up   

20,000 THB (approx. 611 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

 14 Honorable mention awards: 10,000 THB (approx. 306 USD) with certificates

A total of 20 awards, with an aggregate prize value of 340,000 THB (approx. 10,3877 USD)

**5. Judging Committee**

Mr. Prachya Pinkaew, distinguished committee, chair of the judging committee and film director, along with several other distinguished experts.

opens from **today until** **July 5****th****, 2026.**

The application via Google Form

**The application form for Thai language short film**
[https://forms.gle/i8Qnkx6pVXmNqFcT8](https://forms.gle/i8Qnkx6pVXmNqFcT8)

**The application form for foreign language short film**
[https://forms.gle/C6BWqZM1AbKQegqd6](https://forms.gle/C6BWqZM1AbKQegqd6)

CASTING CALL
Age: 18+
Location: South East Wales
Ideally: Able to drive
Date: July 4th - 5th

We are looking for actors based in Wales from any ethnicity, gender or age above 18 to act in our submission the ‘2 day Film Challenge’. Due to the nature of this film challenge we are looking to build a narrative around the actors. We can provide cover for expenses such as travel and catering. If you are interested in joining us for a fun and exciting weekend to make a short film, and to enter the possibility of being viewed by the competitions partners and judges such as Benedict Cumberbatch and the founder of IMDB Mike Leigh please email me at Maximillianrobinson01@gmail.com with a bit about you, any acting experience, headshots or showreels.

Hello!

We are still casting FEMALE IDENTIFYING ACTORS (40s-60s) who are LOCAL to EAU CLAIRE, WI for a non-union feature shooting this fall entitled **Missing Cody**. *Please only submit if you fit this criteria.*

**Logline: **After the unexpected passing of her parents, a runaway is forced back to her childhood home, reuniting with her estranged siblings to pay off their parents’ debts.

**MISS GENEVIEVE LACORTE (40s-60s, F) FEATURED**

The neighborhood mom - you know the type that makes casseroles for her neighbors. A sweet, material figure who helps Margot through troubles.

If you are interested, please contact missingcodycasting@gmail.com with a headshot, and we will be in touch if we would like to see you!

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – "Million Dollar Personality Girl/Boy" (Short Film) 🎬
We are seeking a talented actor with exceptional range for an upcoming artistic short film, "Million Dollar Personality Boy / Girl" (MDPG), set in 1930s Hollywood and scheduled to film this summer.

Role:

BILL "BOJANGLES" ROBINSON

Male/Female African American, Ages 30–60

A legendary tap dancer whose remarkable success cannot shield him from the racial prejudices of the era.

Project Concept:

The film features a brief but powerful conversation between Bill "Bojangles" Robinson and Jeni Le Gon, the first African American woman to sign a long-term contract with a major Hollywood studio. Together, they discuss the challenges and triumphs of Black artists navigating 1930s Hollywood.

Production Details:

Genre: Drama

Location: in 

Shoot Dates: Two-day weekend shoot, July 2026 (Exact dates TBD)

One filming location

Compensation: $750 flat rate

IMDb Credit, Meal, and Reel Footage Included

Preferred Qualifications:

Tap dancing experience is a plus (very light choreography required)

Strong acting ability is the primary focus

This is a unique opportunity to portray an iconic figure in Black entertainment history and showcase your talent in a meaningful and memorable role.

To Submit:

Please send your headshot, resume, and reel to:

SteaDr7@gmail.com

Subject Line: BILL SUBMISSION

Questions, recommendations, and referrals are always appreciated.

We look forward to hearing from you! 🎥✨

🧛‍♂️ “After being welcomed warmly to the cast chat, I was honoured to find I have now been appointed the title of Dark Lord; this is a title I will gladly keep both in rehearsals and in my personal life”

Finishing off our first week of introductions, we are delighted to reveal the Prince of Darkness himself. Meet Aaron George, who will be joining the ranks of the legends of stage and screen to have performed the role of Count Dracula!

🩸 Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill
📅 29–31 October 2026
📍 St Aidan's, Rochdale
🎟️ Tickets available soon!

sharedPost.text:
🧛‍♂️ “After being welcomed warmly to the cast chat, I was honoured to find I have now been appointed the title of Dark Lord; this is a title I will gladly keep both in rehearsals and in my personal life”

Finishing off our first week of introductions, we are delighted to reveal the Prince of Darkness himself. Meet Aaron George, who will be joining the ranks of the legends of stage and screen to have performed the role of Count Dracula!

🎭 About Aaron
Aaron is making a highly anticipated return to the stage after six years away. Ever since watching The Wizard of Oz as a child, the world of drama and musical theatre has been a huge part of his life.
He brings a wealth of fantastic experience to the production. Some of his absolute favourite previous roles include Link Larkin in Hairspray, Marius in Les Misérables, Tom Thumb in Barnum, and Walter Hobbs in Elf the Musical-which earned him a prestigious NODA award!

🦇On Playing Dracula
"I cannot wait to sink my teeth into the infamous character that is Count Dracula. The charming, funny, casually cruel sadist is well known, beloved, and even idolised, but should he be? I guess that’s not for me to conclude. All I do know is I have always found him and vampires fascinating, and dare I say attractive. I am going to have lots of fun bringing both the poise and the terror to this adaptation."

🤪 Fact of the Week 
The vampire squid (Vampyroteuthis infernalis) despite its fearsome scientific name—which translates to "vampire squid from hell"— is entirely harmless, surviving by gently drifting through the dark ocean eating a harmless diet of tiny bits of organic debris and waste.

🩸 Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill
📅 29–31 October 2026
📍 St Aidan's, Rochdale
🎟️ Tickets available soon!

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #MeetTheCast

media.ocrText: Dark red quote card featuring a humorous statement from Aaron George, cast as Dracula. The quote jokes about being given the title “Dark Lord” in the cast chat and happily adopting it both in rehearsals and everyday life. Dark Theatre Rochdale logo in the corner

Official cast reveal poster for Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really. A portrait of Aaron George, who plays Dracula, is displayed on a dark red theatre-branded background. He wears a red shirt and has light brown hair parted in the middle. Production and licensing information appears beneath the image alongside the Dark Theatre Rochdale logo.

items.text:
The next installment in the My Horrible Roommate Winnie The Pooh series!
My Horrible Lover Winnie The Pooh is the next installment within the series. This will be a short film, rather then a full on feature length film like the last two. This is meant to be somewhat of a filler while also contributing to the ongoing story.

I am looking for a female to play the lover of Pooh. 

Character Description: a women who also has a thing for killing. She has a bad girl attitude, but also has a sweet spot for Pooh.

Age Range, 21 and up.

Location, Fort Collins 

Compensation: None

This will be premiering on YouTube along with the rest of the films. Please send me a message for more info!!

I am also looking for extras to be apart of the kill count as well!!

Tworzymy przestrzeń dla dzieci, młodzieży i dorosłych, którzy realizują swoją pasję. 

Bezpieczeństwo to nasz priorytet. 🔐
W naszej bazie aktorów zdjęcia i profile  podopiecznych nie są dostępne dla każdego w sieci. Dostęp do bazy mają wyłącznie zweryfikowani reżyserzy i twórcy projektów. Twoja (lub Twojego dziecka) prywatność jest u nas w 100% bezpieczna.
Chcesz spróbować swoich sił w reklamie, filmie, serialu w profesjonalnych warunkach? Zapraszamy do naszej agencji!

http://www.castella.pl/

items.text:
CASTING – POSZUKUJEMY MODELKI 45+ DO APLIKACJI O ZDROWIU

Do realizacji materiałów wideo z ćwiczeniami dla aplikacji wspierającej zdrowie szyi i kręgosłupa poszukujemy modelki:

Kobieta 45+

Wymagania:

• jasne włosy (średniej długości lub dłuższe)

• zadbana aparycja, czysta skóra, brak tatuaży

• wysportowana, szczupła sylwetka

• dobra postawa ciała

Mile widziane doświadczenie związane z fitnessem lub aktywnością fizyczną, ponieważ ważne będzie technicznie poprawne wykonywanie ćwiczeń.

Ćwiczenia nie są wymagające fizycznie – aplikacja skupia się na zdrowiu szyi i pleców.

📍 Warszawa

📅 3 dni zdjęciowe na początku lipca

Przed zdjęciami odbędą się również 2 dni prób (po ok. 6 godzin każda).

💰 Projekt płatny.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać WYŁĄCZNIE na adres:

casting.shootins.warsaw@gmail.com

W zgłoszeniu prosimy załączyć:

• zdjęcie dobrze widocznej twarzy

• zdjęcie całej sylwetki

• krótką informację o sobie

• informację o swojej dostępności w terminie pomiędzy 29 czerwca a 12 lipca

Referencje zamieszczam poniżej.

items.text: Oferuję montaż demo aktorskiego, według aktualnych wymogów reżyserów obsady. Szczegóły w opisie i na priv :) 🎬

sharedPost.text:
🎥 Montaż demo aktorskiego z konsultacją 

Potrzebujesz demo aktorskiego, które pokaże Twój talent aktorski i wszechstronność a jednocześnie będzie zgodne z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu? Chcesz dowiedzieć się jak pobierać materiały i jak tworzyć takie demo samemu w przyszłości w łatwy sposób oraz jak zwiększyć swoje szanse na konkretną role? Jeżeli tak to zapraszam do skorzystania z mojej usługi 🙂 

✅ dokładnie przejrzę Twoje aktorskie materiały, wybiorę najlepsze aktorsko sceny oraz różnorodne pod względem emocji i ról

✅ zmontuję demo zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu uwzględniając również to, które sceny Ty uważasz za najlepsze 

✅ podczas konsultacji opowiem Ci o obecnych standardach montażu i doboru scen, dam dużo cennych rad abyś mogła / mógł w przyszłości montować demo samodzielnie 

✅ gotowe demo dostaniesz ode mnie maksymalnie w 2 dni od wysłania mi swoich materiałów

✅ przystępna cena 💵 szczegóły na priv 

Na zdjęciach załączam jedną z wiadomość od klienta po moim montażu 🔥💪 

Uwaga! Nie zajmuję się pobieraniem materiałów.

items.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak oferuję: 
🎬mentoring aktorski 
🎬nagranie wizytówek w Warszawie
🎬montaż demo aktorskiego zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów obsady 

Szczegóły w opisie i na priv :)

sharedPost.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak - zapraszam na konsultacje do mnie, nagranie wizytówek i montaż demo aktorskiego! 🎬🤩 Szczegóły w opisie! 

🎥 Mentoring aktorski 

Dla kogo? 

Dla każdego kto chce pracować jako aktor/aktorka na planach zdjęciowych. Zarówno dla tych bez doświadczenia, któryórzy nie wiedzą jak zacząć i co zrobić jak i dla tych co już pierwsze kroki mają za sobą ale chcieliby mieć więcej pracy i potrzebują rady w tym zakresie 🙂 

Na czym polega? 

Spotkanie ze mną 1:1 online, trwające godzinę. Opowiesz mi jakie zlecenia aktorskie Cię interesują - czyli Twój aktorski cel i według tego dobieramy odpowiedni plan działania. Jeżeli masz materiały aktorskie - to je omówimy i powiem co warto byłoby jeszcze do nich dodać lub jak je “podrasować”. Jeżeli nie masz to dowiesz się co i jak masz zrobić żeby je mieć 🙂 Powiem o moich poleceniach agencji aktorskich, jak samodzielnie i łatwo zrobić demo, jak nagrać i co powiedzieć w wizytówkach, jak samodzielnie szukać pracy, jak się wyceniać, na co uważać. I odpowiem na wszystkie inne Twoje pytania. Po spotkaniu otrzymasz ode mnie maila z planem działania i priorytetami do wykonania + materiałami pomocniczymi dot. materiałów aktorskich. 

🎥 Coaching aktorski z wizytówki + nagranie wizytówek w studio 

Na czym polega? 

✅ Tworzę tekst do wizytówek na podstawie informacji o Twoim doświadczeniu, pasjach, zainteresowaniach, który dostajesz przed nagraniem według castingowych wytycznych, który pokaże Twoje największe atuty

✅W studio nagrań nagrywamy 3-4 wizytówki:

🎬 do filmów i seriali 
🎬 do reklam w wersji dłuższej 
🎬 do reklam w wersji krótszej 
🎬 w języku obcym 
Ewentualnie możemy dograć wizytówkę modelingową 

✅ W trakcie nagrywania zadbam o Twoje rozluźnienie, dobrą atmosferę oraz zrobimy kilka ćwiczeń które pomogą pokazać na wizytówkach Twoją energię i błysk w oku 
oraz będę czuwać nad całym procesem

✅ Wizytówki nagramy według aktualnych standardów i wymogów castingowych 

✅ Dostaniesz zmontowane wizytówki gotowe do wysłania przez WeTransfer

🎥 Demo aktorskie 

montaż demo aktorskiego + konsultacja 

Na czym polega? 

✅ otrzymasz ode mnie demo aktorskie zmontowane zgodnie z obecnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu + podczas konsultacji wspólnie dobierzemy sceny, które się w nim znajdą oraz przedstawię Ci mój pomysł na ich kolejność 

Podczas konsultacji dowiesz się również:

✅ jak pobierać materiały do demo aktorskiego 
✅ jakie są obecne wymogi i standardy wzgledem aktorskiego demo 
✅ jakie sceny wybierać i w jakiej kolejności je zmontować  
✅ jak samemu w łatwy sposób przemontować demo pod konkretny casting 

Szczegóły priv

items.title: Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak oferuję:

items.text:
We are looking for women who are a UK size 14 or above for a well known Fashion brand.

Open to all ethnicities and looks.

Aged between 45yrs-75ys (no talent in 20’s or 30’s please.)

It would be fab if the talent had some acting experience, but isn’t strictly necessary.

Shoot Location: London, UK

Shoot Dates: Fitting 20th July

Shoot 2-4 days between 21st - 26th July

Hours: 9+1 hours per day

Fee: BSF: £400 per shoot day x 2-3 day + fitting day at half rate £200

Buyout: Up to £5,000 inclusive - payable to any talent featured in the final campaign.

We are happy to see EU talent, but the fee remains £5K inc and they would need to cover own travel /accommodation etc.

Further details and the online application form are located on our website. www.heathermarch.co.uk

UK & EU for this campaign - Please read the details on our website.

We are looking for submissions ASAP please.

Thank-you x

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING FASHION BRAND FASHIONBRANDCAMPAIGN CAMPAIGN NOW Women aged 45-75 yrs UK Size 14+ £ FOR FULL £400 per shoot day (2-3 shoot days) DETAILS & & TO APPLY Confident models influencers Open ethnicities and looks Shoot Location: London, UK £200 fitting fee Shoot Dates: Late July 2026 Up to £5,000 inclusive buyout Payable talent featured inthe inal campaign heathermarch.co.uk'

topComments.text: I’m age 74, size 16/18 but I’m only 5ft now, I used to be 5ft 2in! Most of my clothes need turning up! I’ve been a tv support artist for over 20 years! Would love to be part of M&S! I usually wear their clothes! X

items.text:
আসসালামু আলাইকুম আমি রোশনাই  
আমরা একটা উদ্যেগ নিতে যাচ্ছি!  
আশা করি সকলে পাশে থাকবেন!  বিশেষ করে আমার ময়মনসিংহ  ভাই আপুরা!  
আমরা একটা প্রোডাকশন হাউজ খোলার উদ্দ্যেগ নিচ্ছি ' 
যারা অভিনয় করেন!  বা ভবিষ্যৎ এ রূপালী  পর্দায়  নিজেকে ফোকাস করার সপ্ন দেখছেন ' কিন্তু  কুনো বিশ্বস্ত্য মাধ্যম এর জন্য আপনার সপ্নকে বাস্তবায়ন করতে পারছেন নাহ?  তাদের জন্য এই উদ্যেগ.  

নাটক ' অয়েব সিরিজ ' বা বড় একটা ফিল্ম industry তে রুপান্তর চাইলেই আমরা করতে পারি!  
আমরা আর কেন ঢাকায়া নাটক অয়েব ' সিরিজ দেখবো? 
চলুন একসাথে আমাদের নীজ জেলার পরিচয় পুরো বাংলাদেশ এর মাধ্যমে ছড়িয়ে দেই!  
মনে রাখবেন!  একতাই বল 

যারা অভিনয় করতে আগ্রহী!  তারা আমার সাথে যোগাযোগ করুন 
সবাই একসাথে আগানো যাবে!  💚

যারা অভিনয় করতে আগ্রহী!  তারা আমার সাথে যোগাযোগ করুন

items.text:
Now casting
Casting a 3-4 year old girl actress for one short scene no dialogue walking in a park. This is a student / indie film- NO PAY but actors will receive IMDb and screen credits. Looking for preferably blonde or lighter tone hair and either hazel or green eyes if possible. Mainly looking for a sweet face with big eyes and cute personality.

WHERE: FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES / SAN FERNANDO VALLEY AREA.

WHAT: One short scene (the ending of the movie) a little girl and a grandpa in a grass field holding hands walking in the sunset.

SYNOPSIS:

“Unforgettable” is a story about hope, courage and the determination of one woman’s journey of the impossible. Through this true story, we learn how one-woman refusal to give up a dream would allow her to receive unusual confirmations from beyond and how a loving song showed her signs of hope along the way. A true story of synchronicity and love between a grandfather and a very special song.

If you know someone who would fit this role please DM me! Looking to film sometime between now and August.

topComments.text: Hi I’m interested I sent you an dm about it

Casting a 3-4 year old girl actress for one short scene no dialogue walking in a park. This is a student / indie film- NO PAY but actors will receive IMDb and screen credits. Looking for preferably blonde or lighter tone hair and either hazel or green eyes if possible. Mainly looking for a sweet face with big eyes and cute personality.

WHERE: FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES / SAN FERNANDO VALLEY AREA.

WHAT: One short scene (the ending of the movie) a little girl and a grandpa in a grass field holding hands walking in the sunset.

SYNOPSIS:

“Unforgettable” is a story about hope, courage and the determination of one woman’s journey of the impossible. Through this true story, we learn how one-woman refusal to give up a dream would allow her to receive unusual confirmations from beyond and how a loving song showed her signs of hope along the way. A true story of synchronicity and love between a grandfather and a very special song.

If you know someone who would fit this role please DM me! Looking to film sometime between now and August.

items.text:
Love queer cabaret? Join us tomorrow, Friday 19 June, as Queer Theatre brings 12 brilliant queer cabaret artists to the Two Brewers in Clapham for a big, sexy night of music, comedy, drag, spoken word, theatre and beautiful queer chaos.

Hosted by our very own Josh Sanchez, with Bran Isabella, Crispin Dipp, Gareth Williams, Grace Lightning, The W*nkers, Lady Harmony Heaven, Lee Campbell, Ryan Graham Hinds, Sir Lady Afrique, Sophia Kleanthous and Victor Von Plume.

Social by design. Hop on different tables to meet other queer creative people, plus special guests, main-stage cabaret afterwards and a DJ until 4am.

🎟️ Tickets are only £20 and now limited. Book via the Queer Theatre website. All profits supporting LGBTQIA+ theatre-projects.

sharedPost.text:
🎬EPISODE ONE OF FEELINGS OF BETRAYAL IS OUT NOW! 🎬

These projects are true passion projects. Nobody is getting paid—we do this because we love storytelling, creativity, and giving people an opportunity to shine. Whether you've never acted a day in your life or you're an experienced actor looking to build your reel, these productions are a place to learn, grow, and create.

If you enjoy what we're doing, we're not asking for money. We're asking for something even more valuable:

✅ FOLLOW our page
✅ COMMENT on the episode
✅ SHARE it with your friends and family

🎭 New episodes release EVERY TUESDAY & FRIDAY!

Thank you for supporting independent creators and believing in what we're building. Now grab some popcorn and enjoy the episode! 🍿🎥
  
@highlight
#WebSeries #IndependentFilm #SupportLocalCreators #Actors #Filmmaking #PassionProject #NewEpisode #FollowCommentShare

items.text:
CASTING CALL
For a SCAD senior thesis titled “SHOOTOUT”

It will be filming October 22nd-25th in Savannah, GA

It is paid (amount depends on character) 

Please read each character description as they do have requirements!

If interested please check out the sides at sophidarlingcasting.com or email sophiadarling.casting@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of hockey and text that says 'SHOOTOUT SHOOTING OCT 22ND-OCT 25TH SAVANNAH,GA WHEN THE THE CAPTAIN OF THE HOCKEY TEAM SUSTAINS A CAREER ENDING INJURY HOW FAR WILL SHE GO TO GET HER FINAL SHOT'

May be an image of text that says 'NICOLE BLACKWELL LEAD 28-36 YEARS OLD WOMAN $200/DAY NICOLE IS THE CAPTAIN OF THE ATLANTA ICE DRAGONS AND FIONA'S WIFE. SHE IS OVERCONFIDENT, SPORTED, AND BELIEVES SHE HAS TO BE THE BEST. SHE'S BEEN SECRETLY BATTLING A KNEE INJURY SHE HAS TOLD NOBODY ABOUT AND AS A RESULT, SHE BECAME OBSESSED WITH WINNING THE COYNE CUP. SHE UNDERSTANDS WITHOUT THE SURGERY HER CAREER WILL END PREMATURELY, BUT SHE PUSHES BACK BECAUSE SHE IS AFRAID THAT SHE'LL NEVER BE THE SAME PLAYER.'

May be an image of hockey and text that says 'FIONA SALO LEAD 28-36 YEARS OLD WOMAN $200/DAY SHE'S THE ASSIST CAPTAIN OF THE ATLANTA ICE DRAGONS AND NICOLE'S WIFE ANO TEAMMATE. SHE'S SOFT SPOKEN, BUT ON THE ICE, SHE IS DOMINANT AND LOUO. FIONA CARES DEEPLY FOR HER WIFE ANO TEAM ANO CAN BRING ANYONE DOWN FROM AN EMOTIONAL OUTBURST. SHE'S USUALLY PRETTY PERCEPTIVE AND NOTICES NICOLE CHANGES IN BEHAVIOR SHE GOES INTO PROTECTIVE MODE WANTING TO SAVE NICOLE FROM HER DESTRUCTIVE TENDENCIES.'

May be an image of basketball and text that says 'COACH BRUCE SUPPORTING 50 60 YEARS OLD WOMAN $150/DAY SHE IS A A FORMER STANDOUT PLAYER AND CURRENT HEAD COACH OF THE ATLANTA ICE DRAGONS. SHE WAS VERY SIMILAR TO NICOLE IN HER PLAYING DAYS, NEEDING TO BE THE BEST IN THE TEAM NO MATTER WHAT. AS THE HEAD COACH, SHE'S A NO NONSENSE WOMAN AND THRIVES FOR HER TEAM TO PLAY HARD AND SUPPORT ACH OTHER. SHE IS SECRETLY AWARE OF NICOLE'S INJURY.'

NOW CASTING!!!!! 

THIS COULD BE THE OPPORTUNITY OF A LIFETIME 

Have you ever dreamed of traveling the world, changing lives, and getting paid to tell incredible human stories?

We’re casting charismatic duos to become the faces of a major philanthropy YouTube channel, traveling across the globe and meeting people whose stories deserve to be seen and heard.

We’re looking for:

 Couples

 Best Friends

 Siblings

 Dynamic Duos

If you have amazing chemistry, a magnetic personality, a sense of adventure, and a genuine passion for helping others, we want to hear from you.

Apply at: MysticArt Pictures

#philanthropy #payitforward #TeamMystic #casting

Any fun, interesting connections, or insighful conversations you've had with passengers? UBER PASSENGERS Have you experienced an incredible act of kindness from an Uber driver who went above an beyond? Has conversation you've had with α driver stuck with you? We want to hear form you! Please DM me or reach out to the email address below. This is α paid opportunity. Email: claytontvcasting@gmail.com www.thedogoodcrew.com'
